nasb.text: Beware that your hearts are not deceived, and that you do not turn away and serve other gods and worship them.

esv.text: Take care lest your heart be deceived, and you turn aside and serve other gods and worship them;

cnv.text: 你們要謹慎，免得你們的心受迷惑，你們就偏離了我，去事奉別的神，並且敬拜它們；

ccb.text: 你们要谨慎，免得被迷惑，转而祭拜、供奉其他神明。
